summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for PROTOCOL ΔΣ post-hardening regression sweep. Verified security improvements, refactored endpoints, and regression testing with 40/43 tests passing.

minor_issues.impact: Expected security behavior - webhooks require proper signature validation
minor_issues.note: This is correct security behavior, not a bug

test_environment_notes.status: mode=off as expected in test environment
test_environment_notes.note: Endpoint correctly returns minimal response when polling is disabled

passed_tests: Admin login with correct password returns JWT token
Access card format DS-02-XXXX-XXXX-XX (18 chars, uppercase alphanum + 3 dashes)
Access card uniqueness across multiple calls
GET /api/vault/state returns vault payload
Admin vault config reset randomizes 6-digit target combination
GET /api/ returns prophet-online payload
GET /api/stats returns whitelist_count/prophecies_served/chat_messages/launch_timestamp
GET /api/public/stats?days=30 returns series+lang_distribution+top_sessions+activity_heatmap
POST /api/whitelist happy-path accepts email submissions
Operation reveal returns unlocked:false when stage != DECLASSIFIED
All admin endpoints require JWT (401 without token, 200 with valid token)
All vault admin endpoints are JWT-protected
Refactored blacklist import with csv_text returns {imported, skipped_*, errors}
Refactored blacklist import with emails array works
Refactored blacklist import with cooldown_days sets cooldown_until
Refactored blacklist import with 5001 rows returns 413
Vault crack flow: POST /api/admin/vault/crack updates state and returns admin view
Access card request generates valid accreditation number
Access card verify with unknown accred returns {ok:false}
Access card verify with valid accred returns {ok:true, session_token}
Access card status with X-Session-Token header returns {ok:true}
Access card image endpoint returns image/png
Background loops startup message found in supervisor logs

success_percentage.regression_tests: 83% (5/6 tests passed - webhook 401 is expected behavior)
